title: dupatya saxatilis
intro: Dupatya saxatilis, also known as Chinese angelica or Dong quai, is a perennial plant native to Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dupatya saxatilis include improving menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and fertility, as well as supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Dupatya saxatilis include teas, tinctures, and capsules, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
